notes: v0.3.19: Fix crackling — replaced ScriptProcessorNode with AudioBufferSourceNode scheduling. Root cause: two unsynchronized clocks (WebAudio vs device) causing periodic silence gaps when the ScriptProcessor callback fired before IPC data arrived. New approach schedules each audio chunk at a precise time via source.start(), eliminating clock drift entirely. Also smaller Rust batches (50ms) and faster polling (2ms sleep).
